name: io.github.murilopereira/mcp-graphql-bridge
description: Generic MCP server that bridges any GraphQL API to Claude Code — one tool per query and mutation, auto-discovered via schema introspection.

environmentVariables.name: GRAPHQL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: GraphQL endpoint URL used for executing queries and mutations

environmentVariables.name: GRAPHQL_INTROSPECTION_URL
environmentVariables.description: GraphQL endpoint URL used for schema introspection (can be the same as GRAPHQL_API_URL)

environmentVariables.name: GRAPHQL_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the GraphQL API. Omit for public or unauthenticated endpoints.
